requirements.title: Message.Topic must be a non-empty UTF-8 string identifying the publish destin...
requirements.text: Message.Topic must be a non-empty UTF-8 string identifying the publish destination.

requirements.title: Message.Payload must be a byte slice carrying the message body; nil or empty...
requirements.text: Message.Payload must be a byte slice carrying the message body; nil or empty is valid.

requirements.title: Message.QoS must reflect the quality-of-service level negotiated for this del...
requirements.text: Message.QoS must reflect the quality-of-service level negotiated for this delivery.

requirements.title: Message.Retained must be true when the broker is delivering a stored retained...
requirements.text: Message.Retained must be true when the broker is delivering a stored retained copy.

requirements.title: Message.PacketID must be non-zero for QoS >= 1 messages and zero for QoS 0
requirements.text: Message.PacketID must be non-zero for QoS >= 1 messages and zero for QoS 0.

requirements.title: Message.ResponseTopic must carry the MQTT v5 Response Topic property (propert...
requirements.text: Message.ResponseTopic must carry the MQTT v5 Response Topic property (property ID 0x08).

requirements.title: Message.CorrelationData must carry the MQTT v5 Correlation Data property (pro...
requirements.text: Message.CorrelationData must carry the MQTT v5 Correlation Data property (property ID 0x09).

requirements.title: Message.UserProperties must carry MQTT v5 User Property key/value pairs (prop...
requirements.text: Message.UserProperties must carry MQTT v5 User Property key/value pairs (property ID 0x26).

requirements.title: Message.ContentType must carry the MQTT v5 Content Type property (property ID...
requirements.text: Message.ContentType must carry the MQTT v5 Content Type property (property ID 0x03).

requirements.title: Message.ExpiryInterval must carry the MQTT v5 Message Expiry Interval in seco...
requirements.text: Message.ExpiryInterval must carry the MQTT v5 Message Expiry Interval in seconds (property ID 0x02); 0 means no expiry.

requirements.title: AtMostOnce (QoS 0) must have integer value 0
requirements.text: AtMostOnce (QoS 0) must have integer value 0.

requirements.title: AtLeastOnce (QoS 1) must have integer value 1
requirements.text: AtLeastOnce (QoS 1) must have integer value 1.

requirements.title: ExactlyOnce (QoS 2) must have integer value 2
requirements.text: ExactlyOnce (QoS 2) must have integer value 2.

requirements.title: The three QoS constant values must be mutually distinct
requirements.text: The three QoS constant values must be mutually distinct.

requirements.title: An outbound QoS 2 Publish must send PUBLISH then complete only after the PUBL...
requirements.text: An outbound QoS 2 Publish must send PUBLISH then complete only after the PUBLISH → PUBREC → PUBREL → PUBCOMP handshake succeeds.

requirements.title: On receiving PUBREC for an in-flight outbound publish the client must send PU...
requirements.text: On receiving PUBREC for an in-flight outbound publish the client must send PUBREL; on PUBCOMP it must resolve the publish as complete.

requirements.title: An inbound QoS 2 PUBLISH must be acknowledged with PUBREC and delivered to su...
requirements.text: An inbound QoS 2 PUBLISH must be acknowledged with PUBREC and delivered to subscribers exactly once, on receipt of PUBREL, deduplicated by packet identifier.

requirements.title: Each QoS 2 handshake step must fail with ErrTimeout if unanswered within the...
requirements.text: Each QoS 2 handshake step must fail with ErrTimeout if unanswered within the configured per-step timeout, and must honour context cancellation and client close.

requirements.title: VarLen encoding must use 7-bit LSB groups with MSB=1 as the continuation mark...
requirements.text: VarLen encoding must use 7-bit LSB groups with MSB=1 as the continuation marker (MQTT §2.2.3).

requirements.title: VarLen encoding must represent values 0 to 268,435,455 in at most 4 bytes
requirements.text: VarLen encoding must represent values 0 to 268,435,455 in at most 4 bytes.

requirements.title: VarLen decoding must return an error when a 5th byte with MSB=1 is encountered
requirements.text: VarLen decoding must return an error when a 5th byte with MSB=1 is encountered.

requirements.title: String encoding must prefix UTF-8 bytes with a 2-byte big-endian byte count (...
requirements.text: String encoding must prefix UTF-8 bytes with a 2-byte big-endian byte count (MQTT §1.5.4).

requirements.title: CONNECT must encode the protocol name as the 6-byte sequence 0x00 0x04 'M' 'Q...
requirements.text: CONNECT must encode the protocol name as the 6-byte sequence 0x00 0x04 'M' 'Q' 'T' 'T'.

requirements.title: CONNECT v3.1.1 must set the protocol level byte to 0x04
requirements.text: CONNECT v3.1.1 must set the protocol level byte to 0x04.

requirements.title: PUBLISH fixed header bit 0 must encode the RETAIN flag (MQTT §3.3.1.3)
requirements.text: PUBLISH fixed header bit 0 must encode the RETAIN flag (MQTT §3.3.1.3).

requirements.title: PUBLISH fixed header bits [2:1] must encode the QoS level (MQTT §3.3.1.2)
requirements.text: PUBLISH fixed header bits [2:1] must encode the QoS level (MQTT §3.3.1.2).

requirements.title: PUBLISH fixed header bit 3 must encode the DUP flag (MQTT §3.3.1.1)
requirements.text: PUBLISH fixed header bit 3 must encode the DUP flag (MQTT §3.3.1.1).

requirements.title: QoS >= 1 PUBLISH packets must include a non-zero 2-byte big-endian packet ide...
requirements.text: QoS >= 1 PUBLISH packets must include a non-zero 2-byte big-endian packet identifier.

requirements.title: SUBSCRIBE packets must include a non-zero 2-byte big-endian packet identifier
requirements.text: SUBSCRIBE packets must include a non-zero 2-byte big-endian packet identifier.

requirements.title: UNSUBSCRIBE packets must include a non-zero 2-byte big-endian packet identifier
requirements.text: UNSUBSCRIBE packets must include a non-zero 2-byte big-endian packet identifier.

requirements.title: PUBREC packets must carry the 2-byte big-endian packet identifier of the PUBL...
requirements.text: PUBREC packets must carry the 2-byte big-endian packet identifier of the PUBLISH being acknowledged.

requirements.title: PUBREL packets must use fixed-header flags 0b0010 and carry the 2-byte big-en...
requirements.text: PUBREL packets must use fixed-header flags 0b0010 and carry the 2-byte big-endian packet identifier.

requirements.title: PUBCOMP packets must carry the 2-byte big-endian packet identifier completing...
requirements.text: PUBCOMP packets must carry the 2-byte big-endian packet identifier completing the QoS 2 handshake.

requirements.title: Dial must send CONNECT to the broker before waiting for CONNACK
requirements.text: Dial must send CONNECT to the broker before waiting for CONNACK.

requirements.title: Dial must not return the Client until a CONNACK packet is received
requirements.text: Dial must not return the Client until a CONNACK packet is received.

requirements.title: Dial must return an error if the TCP connection cannot be established
requirements.text: Dial must return an error if the TCP connection cannot be established.

requirements.title: Dial must close the TCP connection if any part of the CONNECT/CONNACK handsha...
requirements.text: Dial must close the TCP connection if any part of the CONNECT/CONNACK handshake fails.

requirements.title: Dial (v3.1.1) must return an error when the CONNACK return code byte is non-zero
requirements.text: Dial (v3.1.1) must return an error when the CONNACK return code byte is non-zero.

requirements.title: Close must send a DISCONNECT packet before closing the TCP connection
requirements.text: Close must send a DISCONNECT packet before closing the TCP connection.

requirements.title: Close must close the TCP connection after sending DISCONNECT
requirements.text: Close must close the TCP connection after sending DISCONNECT.

requirements.title: Close must be idempotent: subsequent calls after the first must not panic or...
requirements.text: Close must be idempotent: subsequent calls after the first must not panic or produce side effects.

requirements.title: The client must send PINGREQ at the negotiated keepalive interval
requirements.text: The client must send PINGREQ at the negotiated keepalive interval.

requirements.title: The keepalive goroutine must exit when Close is called
requirements.text: The keepalive goroutine must exit when Close is called.

requirements.title: WithWill must encode the will topic, will message, will QoS, and will retain...
requirements.text: WithWill must encode the will topic, will message, will QoS, and will retain flag in the CONNECT packet per MQTT §3.1.2.5–3.1.2.7.

requirements.title: When WithTLS is configured, Dial must wrap the TCP connection with tls.Client...
requirements.text: When WithTLS is configured, Dial must wrap the TCP connection with tls.Client and complete the TLS handshake before sending CONNECT.

requirements.title: A failed TLS handshake (untrusted server certificate, or missing client certi...
requirements.text: A failed TLS handshake (untrusted server certificate, or missing client certificate under mutual TLS) must cause Dial to return a non-nil error and not establish an MQTT session.

requirements.title: DialTLS must supply a default tls.Config (TLS 1.2 minimum, ServerName derived...
requirements.text: DialTLS must supply a default tls.Config (TLS 1.2 minimum, ServerName derived from the address) when none is provided, and an explicit WithTLS must take precedence over that default.

requirements.title: DialWS must accept ws:// and wss:// URLs and reject any other scheme with an...
requirements.text: DialWS must accept ws:// and wss:// URLs and reject any other scheme with an error.

requirements.title: DialWS over wss:// must complete the TLS handshake (using WithTLS or a defaul...
requirements.text: DialWS over wss:// must complete the TLS handshake (using WithTLS or a default TLS 1.2 config with ServerName from the URL host) before the WebSocket handshake.

requirements.title: The WebSocket opening handshake must request the mqtt subprotocol and verify...
requirements.text: The WebSocket opening handshake must request the mqtt subprotocol and verify the 101 status and the RFC 6455 Sec-WebSocket-Accept value before use.

requirements.title: Outbound MQTT control packets must be sent as masked WebSocket binary frames...
requirements.text: Outbound MQTT control packets must be sent as masked WebSocket binary frames (RFC 6455 §5.3), with correct 7/16/64-bit payload length encoding.

requirements.title: Inbound WebSocket data frames must be unmasked and reassembled into the MQTT...
requirements.text: Inbound WebSocket data frames must be unmasked and reassembled into the MQTT byte stream; the 16- and 64-bit extended length forms must be decoded.

requirements.title: A WebSocket ping must be answered with a pong, and a close frame must termina...
requirements.text: A WebSocket ping must be answered with a pong, and a close frame must terminate the stream; Close must send a close frame before closing the connection.

requirements.title: Publish must return ErrTopicEmpty when topic is an empty string
requirements.text: Publish must return ErrTopicEmpty when topic is an empty string.

requirements.title: Publish must return ErrQoSUnsupported when QoS is ExactlyOnce (QoS 2)
requirements.text: Publish must return ErrQoSUnsupported when QoS is ExactlyOnce (QoS 2).

requirements.title: Publish must return ErrClosed when called on a closed client
requirements.text: Publish must return ErrClosed when called on a closed client.

requirements.title: Publish must return ctx.Err() when the context is cancelled before the send c...
requirements.text: Publish must return ctx.Err() when the context is cancelled before the send completes.

requirements.title: Publish at QoS 0 must not include a packet identifier in the PUBLISH packet
requirements.text: Publish at QoS 0 must not include a packet identifier in the PUBLISH packet.

requirements.title: Publish at QoS 1 must include a non-zero packet identifier in the PUBLISH packet
requirements.text: Publish at QoS 1 must include a non-zero packet identifier in the PUBLISH packet.

requirements.title: Subscribe must return ErrTopicEmpty when the topic filter is an empty string
requirements.text: Subscribe must return ErrTopicEmpty when the topic filter is an empty string.

requirements.title: Subscribe must return ErrClosed when called on a closed client
requirements.text: Subscribe must return ErrClosed when called on a closed client.

requirements.title: Subscribe must return a Subscription backed by a buffered message channel
requirements.text: Subscribe must return a Subscription backed by a buffered message channel.

requirements.title: The default subscription channel depth must be at least 64 when not configure...
requirements.text: The default subscription channel depth must be at least 64 when not configured by the caller.

requirements.title: Subscription channel depth must be configurable by the caller via SubscriberO...
requirements.text: Subscription channel depth must be configurable by the caller via SubscriberOption.

requirements.title: Subscribe must send a SUBSCRIBE packet to the broker carrying the given filte...
requirements.text: Subscribe must send a SUBSCRIBE packet to the broker carrying the given filter and QoS.

requirements.title: Incoming PUBLISH messages must be delivered to all subscriptions where MatchT...
requirements.text: Incoming PUBLISH messages must be delivered to all subscriptions where MatchTopic returns true.

requirements.title: A PUBLISH matching multiple active subscriptions must be delivered independen...
requirements.text: A PUBLISH matching multiple active subscriptions must be delivered independently to each one.

requirements.title: MatchTopic("#") must return true for any topic that does not start with '$'
requirements.text: MatchTopic("#") must return true for any topic that does not start with '$'.

requirements.title: MatchTopic("#") must return false for any topic that starts with '$'
requirements.text: MatchTopic("#") must return false for any topic that starts with '$'.

requirements.title: MatchTopic("prefix/#") must return true when topic equals "prefix" exactly
requirements.text: MatchTopic("prefix/#") must return true when topic equals "prefix" exactly.

requirements.title: MatchTopic("prefix/#") must return true when topic starts with "prefix/"
requirements.text: MatchTopic("prefix/#") must return true when topic starts with "prefix/".

requirements.title: MatchTopic("prefix/#") must return false for '$'-prefixed topics when prefix...
requirements.text: MatchTopic("prefix/#") must return false for '$'-prefixed topics when prefix has no '$'.

requirements.title: MatchTopic with '+' at any position must match exactly one topic level
requirements.text: MatchTopic with '+' at any position must match exactly one topic level.

requirements.title: MatchTopic with '+' at level 0 must return false for topics that start with '$'
requirements.text: MatchTopic with '+' at level 0 must return false for topics that start with '$'.

requirements.title: MatchTopic must return true when filter equals topic and neither contains a w...
requirements.text: MatchTopic must return true when filter equals topic and neither contains a wildcard character.

requirements.title: Client.Publish on a closed client must return ErrClosed
requirements.text: Client.Publish on a closed client must return ErrClosed.

requirements.title: Client.Subscribe on a closed client must return ErrClosed
requirements.text: Client.Subscribe on a closed client must return ErrClosed.

requirements.title: Client.Publish and Client.Subscribe must not panic on any valid or invalid input
requirements.text: Client.Publish and Client.Subscribe must not panic on any valid or invalid input.

requirements.title: Client.Publish with an empty topic must return ErrTopicEmpty
requirements.text: Client.Publish with an empty topic must return ErrTopicEmpty.

requirements.title: Client.Subscribe with an empty topic must return ErrTopicEmpty
requirements.text: Client.Subscribe with an empty topic must return ErrTopicEmpty.

requirements.title: All active subscription channels must be closed when the TCP connection is lost
requirements.text: All active subscription channels must be closed when the TCP connection is lost.

requirements.title: All active subscription channels must be closed when Client.Close is called
requirements.text: All active subscription channels must be closed when Client.Close is called.

requirements.title: Message delivery must never block: a full subscription channel must silently...
requirements.text: Message delivery must never block: a full subscription channel must silently drop the message.

requirements.title: Broker.Subscribe must deliver all retained messages matching the filter at su...
requirements.text: Broker.Subscribe must deliver all retained messages matching the filter at subscribe time.

requirements.title: Broker.route must store a retained message (non-empty payload) before fan-out...
requirements.text: Broker.route must store a retained message (non-empty payload) before fan-out to current subscribers.

requirements.title: Broker.route must delete a stored retained message when the published payload...
requirements.text: Broker.route must delete a stored retained message when the published payload is empty.

requirements.title: Broker.route must deliver to all subscriptions where MatchTopic returns true...
requirements.text: Broker.route must deliver to all subscriptions where MatchTopic returns true for the message topic.

requirements.title: Broker.Dial must return a new client that is connected to the same in-process...
requirements.text: Broker.Dial must return a new client that is connected to the same in-process broker.

requirements.title: v5.Dial must send an MQTT 5.0 CONNECT packet (protocol level byte 0x05)
requirements.text: v5.Dial must send an MQTT 5.0 CONNECT packet (protocol level byte 0x05).

requirements.title: v5.Dial must not return the Client until a CONNACK is received
requirements.text: v5.Dial must not return the Client until a CONNACK is received.

requirements.title: v5.Dial must return an error when the CONNACK reason code byte is non-zero
requirements.text: v5.Dial must return an error when the CONNACK reason code byte is non-zero.

requirements.title: v5 Client must parse and apply TopicAliasMax from CONNACK properties
requirements.text: v5 Client must parse and apply TopicAliasMax from CONNACK properties.

requirements.title: Each MQTT v5 property must be preceded by its 1-byte property identifier
requirements.text: Each MQTT v5 property must be preceded by its 1-byte property identifier.

requirements.title: The v5 property section must be preceded by a VarLen total byte count of all...
requirements.text: The v5 property section must be preceded by a VarLen total byte count of all property bytes.

requirements.title: v5 property decoding must skip unknown property identifiers without returning...
requirements.text: v5 property decoding must skip unknown property identifiers without returning an error.

requirements.title: CONNECT v5.0 must set the protocol level byte to 0x05
requirements.text: CONNECT v5.0 must set the protocol level byte to 0x05.

requirements.title: PublishV5 must encode each UserProperty pair with property identifier 0x26
requirements.text: PublishV5 must encode each UserProperty pair with property identifier 0x26.

requirements.title: PublishV5 must encode ResponseTopic with property identifier 0x08 when non-empty
requirements.text: PublishV5 must encode ResponseTopic with property identifier 0x08 when non-empty.

requirements.title: PublishV5 must encode CorrelationData with property identifier 0x09 when non-...
requirements.text: PublishV5 must encode CorrelationData with property identifier 0x09 when non-nil and non-empty.

requirements.title: PublishV5 must encode MessageExpiryInterval with property identifier 0x02 whe...
requirements.text: PublishV5 must encode MessageExpiryInterval with property identifier 0x02 when non-zero.

requirements.title: PublishV5 must encode ContentType with property identifier 0x03 when non-empty
requirements.text: PublishV5 must encode ContentType with property identifier 0x03 when non-empty.

requirements.title: PublishV5 must encode TopicAlias with property identifier 0x23 when non-zero
requirements.text: PublishV5 must encode TopicAlias with property identifier 0x23 when non-zero.

requirements.title: SubscribeV5 must encode QoS in bits [1:0] of the subscription options byte
requirements.text: SubscribeV5 must encode QoS in bits [1:0] of the subscription options byte.

requirements.title: SubscribeV5 must set bit 2 of the subscription options byte when NoLocal is true
requirements.text: SubscribeV5 must set bit 2 of the subscription options byte when NoLocal is true.

requirements.title: SubscribeV5 must set bit 3 of the subscription options byte when RetainAsPubl...
requirements.text: SubscribeV5 must set bit 3 of the subscription options byte when RetainAsPublished is true.

requirements.title: SubscribeV5 must encode RetainHandling in bits [5:4] of the subscription opti...
requirements.text: SubscribeV5 must encode RetainHandling in bits [5:4] of the subscription options byte.

requirements.title: v5 Client must register a topic alias when PUBLISH arrives with both a non-em...
requirements.text: v5 Client must register a topic alias when PUBLISH arrives with both a non-empty topic and a non-zero alias.

requirements.title: v5 Client must resolve a topic alias when PUBLISH arrives with empty topic an...
requirements.text: v5 Client must resolve a topic alias when PUBLISH arrives with empty topic and a non-zero alias.

requirements.title: v5 Client must drop a PUBLISH when topic is empty and the alias is not regist...
requirements.text: v5 Client must drop a PUBLISH when topic is empty and the alias is not registered.

requirements.title: WithSessionExpiry must encode SessionExpiryInterval with property identifier...
requirements.text: WithSessionExpiry must encode SessionExpiryInterval with property identifier 0x11 in CONNECT properties.

requirements.title: All exported Client methods must be safe for concurrent use from multiple gor...
requirements.text: All exported Client methods must be safe for concurrent use from multiple goroutines (go test -race must pass).

requirements.title: Concurrent calls to Publish and Subscribe on the same Client must not cause a...
requirements.text: Concurrent calls to Publish and Subscribe on the same Client must not cause a data race.

requirements.title: Concurrent calls to Close and any other Client method must not panic
requirements.text: Concurrent calls to Close and any other Client method must not panic.

requirements.title: All goroutines started by Dial must exit after Close is called; no goroutine...
requirements.text: All goroutines started by Dial must exit after Close is called; no goroutine leak.

requirements.title: Subscription state (channel, filter) must be released when a Subscription is...
requirements.text: Subscription state (channel, filter) must be released when a Subscription is closed.

requirements.title: Message payload bytes delivered to a Subscription channel must be a copy owne...
requirements.text: Message payload bytes delivered to a Subscription channel must be a copy owned by the receiver; internal buffers must not be aliased.

requirements.title: Messages on a single Subscription channel must arrive in the order they were...
requirements.text: Messages on a single Subscription channel must arrive in the order they were received from the network.

requirements.title: QoS 0 PUBLISH packets sent from a single goroutine must be written to the net...
requirements.text: QoS 0 PUBLISH packets sent from a single goroutine must be written to the network in the order Publish was called.

requirements.title: A broker sending a malformed variable-length integer must cause the client to...
requirements.text: A broker sending a malformed variable-length integer must cause the client to close without panicking.

requirements.title: A broker sending an unexpected or unknown packet type must be silently ignore...
requirements.text: A broker sending an unexpected or unknown packet type must be silently ignored without corrupting client state.

requirements.title: TCP connection loss must cause all subscription channels to be closed within...
requirements.text: TCP connection loss must cause all subscription channels to be closed within the next read attempt.

requirements.title: Publish on a client after Close() must return ErrClosed (session loss: publis...
requirements.text: Publish on a client after Close() must return ErrClosed (session loss: publish path).

requirements.title: Subscribe on a client after Close() must return ErrClosed (session loss: subs...
requirements.text: Subscribe on a client after Close() must return ErrClosed (session loss: subscribe path).

requirements.title: Close() must be idempotent: calling it multiple times must not panic or retur...
requirements.text: Close() must be idempotent: calling it multiple times must not panic or return an error.

requirements.title: Publish and Subscribe with an empty topic must return ErrTopicEmpty before an...
requirements.text: Publish and Subscribe with an empty topic must return ErrTopicEmpty before any broker contact.

requirements.title: Publish with a cancelled context must return a non-nil error (context cancell...
requirements.text: Publish with a cancelled context must return a non-nil error (context cancellation / packet loss).

requirements.title: When a subscription channel is full, the incoming message must be dropped sil...
requirements.text: When a subscription channel is full, the incoming message must be dropped silently; Publish must not block or error (DropNewest back-pressure).

requirements.title: Concurrent calls to Close() and Publish() must not panic or deadlock
requirements.text: Concurrent calls to Close() and Publish() must not panic or deadlock.

requirements.title: SpecVersion must be bound to relay.SpecVersion (currently "1.0") so it tracks...
requirements.text: SpecVersion must be bound to relay.SpecVersion (currently "1.0") so it tracks the RELAY package and cannot drift (RELAY spec §17.12).

requirements.title: ErrClosed, ErrNotConnected, ErrPayloadTooLarge must each wrap the correspondi...
requirements.text: ErrClosed, ErrNotConnected, ErrPayloadTooLarge must each wrap the corresponding relay sentinel so errors.Is reaches relay.ErrClosed etc. (RELAY spec §5.2).

requirements.title: ErrTimeout must be defined and must wrap relay.ErrTimeout (RELAY spec §5.1)
requirements.text: ErrTimeout must be defined and must wrap relay.ErrTimeout (RELAY spec §5.1).

requirements.title: BackPressurePolicy must define DropNewest=0, DropOldest=1, Block=2 (RELAY spe...
requirements.text: BackPressurePolicy must define DropNewest=0, DropOldest=1, Block=2 (RELAY spec §14.1).

requirements.title: SubscriberConfig must include a BackPressure field of type BackPressurePolicy...
requirements.text: SubscriberConfig must include a BackPressure field of type BackPressurePolicy defaulting to DropNewest (RELAY spec §14.1).

requirements.title: WithBackPressure must return a SubscriberOption that sets BackPressure on Sub...
requirements.text: WithBackPressure must return a SubscriberOption that sets BackPressure on SubscriberConfig (RELAY spec §14.1).

requirements.title: Adapt must wrap a Client as relay.Node returning relay.MQTT as the Protocol (...
requirements.text: Adapt must wrap a Client as relay.Node returning relay.MQTT as the Protocol (RELAY spec §10.3).

requirements.title: Message.ToMessage must return a relay.Message with Protocol=relay.MQTT, ID=To...
requirements.text: Message.ToMessage must return a relay.Message with Protocol=relay.MQTT, ID=Topic, and mqtt.qos/mqtt.retained in Meta (RELAY spec §15.7.4).

requirements.title: FromMessage must set Message.Topic from relay.Message.ID and parse mqtt.qos/m...
requirements.text: FromMessage must set Message.Topic from relay.Message.ID and parse mqtt.qos/mqtt.retained from Meta (RELAY spec §15.7.4).

requirements.title: HealthStatus must define HealthOK=0, HealthDegraded=1, HealthDown=2 matching...
requirements.text: HealthStatus must define HealthOK=0, HealthDegraded=1, HealthDown=2 matching RELAY spec §9.

requirements.title: HealthProvider interface must expose Health() returning a Health struct with...
requirements.text: HealthProvider interface must expose Health() returning a Health struct with Status and Details (RELAY spec §9).

requirements.title: Metrics struct must carry WriteCount, DeliverCount, DropCount, BytesWritten,...
requirements.text: Metrics struct must carry WriteCount, DeliverCount, DropCount, BytesWritten, BytesDelivered, ErrorCount (RELAY spec §9).

requirements.title: MetricsProvider interface must expose Metrics() returning a Metrics struct (R...
requirements.text: MetricsProvider interface must expose Metrics() returning a Metrics struct (RELAY spec §9).

requirements.title: Drainer interface must expose CloseWithDrain(ctx context.Context) error that...
requirements.text: Drainer interface must expose CloseWithDrain(ctx context.Context) error that blocks until in-flight messages drain (RELAY spec §9).

requirements.title: PathToTopic must convert a VSS dot path to an MQTT topic, mapping a trailing...
requirements.text: PathToTopic must convert a VSS dot path to an MQTT topic, mapping a trailing .* subtree to /# and a * segment to +.

requirements.title: TopicToPath must convert an MQTT slash topic back to a VSS dot path (inverse...
requirements.text: TopicToPath must convert an MQTT slash topic back to a VSS dot path (inverse of PathToTopic for concrete topics).

requirements.title: Signal must carry Path, Value, and Timestamp with VISSv2-compatible JSON fiel...
requirements.text: Signal must carry Path, Value, and Timestamp with VISSv2-compatible JSON field names.

requirements.title: Signal.Float, Signal.Bool, and Signal.String must return the typed value with...
requirements.text: Signal.Float, Signal.Bool, and Signal.String must return the typed value with an ok flag that is false when the underlying value is a different type.

requirements.title: vissr.New must wrap an mqtt.Client and vissr.Client must delegate transport t...
requirements.text: vissr.New must wrap an mqtt.Client and vissr.Client must delegate transport to it.

requirements.title: Set/SetFloat/SetBool/SetString must JSON-encode a Signal envelope and publish...
requirements.text: Set/SetFloat/SetBool/SetString must JSON-encode a Signal envelope and publish it to the mapped MQTT topic, returning ErrTopicEmpty for an empty path.

requirements.title: Subscribe must map the VSS path to an MQTT filter and return a Subscription d...
requirements.text: Subscribe must map the VSS path to an MQTT filter and return a Subscription delivering decoded Signals, returning ErrTopicEmpty for an empty path.

requirements.title: Client.Close must close the underlying mqtt.Client
requirements.text: Client.Close must close the underlying mqtt.Client.

requirements.title: A malformed (non-JSON) payload must be dropped without stalling the Signal st...
requirements.text: A malformed (non-JSON) payload must be dropped without stalling the Signal stream; a missing path must be backfilled from the topic.

requirements.title: Subscription.Unsubscribe and Subscription.Close must delegate to the underlyi...
requirements.text: Subscription.Unsubscribe and Subscription.Close must delegate to the underlying mqtt.Subscription.

requirements.title: A federation Route must declare source topic Filters and an optional MaxQoS c...
requirements.text: A federation Route must declare source topic Filters and an optional MaxQoS cap, StripPrefix, and AddPrefix.

requirements.title: New must create a Bridge forwarding from a source to a destination mqtt.Clien...
requirements.text: New must create a Bridge forwarding from a source to a destination mqtt.Client; Pair must create two Bridges with independent per-direction route sets.

requirements.title: Start must subscribe to every route filter on the source; on a subscribe erro...
requirements.text: Start must subscribe to every route filter on the source; on a subscribe error it must roll back prior subscriptions and return the error. Start must be idempotent.

requirements.title: Forwarded messages must be republished to the destination at min(message QoS,...
requirements.text: Forwarded messages must be republished to the destination at min(message QoS, route MaxQoS).

requirements.title: Topic remapping must strip StripPrefix (on a topic-level boundary) and prepen...
requirements.text: Topic remapping must strip StripPrefix (on a topic-level boundary) and prepend AddPrefix before republishing; a topic that reduces to empty must not be republished.

requirements.title: Stop must end forwarding and close all source subscriptions without closing t...
requirements.text: Stop must end forwarding and close all source subscriptions without closing the source or destination clients; it must be idempotent. The Bridge must not reconnect automatically (RELAY spec §6.10).

requirements.title: Stats must report the number of messages forwarded and dropped
requirements.text: Stats must report the number of messages forwarded and dropped.

requirements.title: A republish failure must increment the dropped counter and must not stop the...
requirements.text: A republish failure must increment the dropped counter and must not stop the forwarding goroutine.

requirements.title: The broker must read a complete MQTT v3.1.1 packet (fixed header, remaining-l...
requirements.text: The broker must read a complete MQTT v3.1.1 packet (fixed header, remaining-length varint, body) and reject a malformed remaining length.

requirements.title: The broker must build CONNACK, SUBACK, UNSUBACK, PUBACK, PUBREC, PUBCOMP, and...
requirements.text: The broker must build CONNACK, SUBACK, UNSUBACK, PUBACK, PUBREC, PUBCOMP, and PUBLISH packets with correct headers and length-prefixed fields.

requirements.title: broker.New must create a Server; the Server must track connected sessions, re...
requirements.text: broker.New must create a Server; the Server must track connected sessions, retained messages, and listeners.

requirements.title: ListenAndServe and Serve must accept TCP connections and start a session goro...
requirements.text: ListenAndServe and Serve must accept TCP connections and start a session goroutine per connection until the server is closed.

requirements.title: Close must stop all listeners and disconnect all sessions, and must be idempo...
requirements.text: Close must stop all listeners and disconnect all sessions, and must be idempotent.

requirements.title: A session must require CONNECT as the first packet and answer CONNACK before...
requirements.text: A session must require CONNECT as the first packet and answer CONNACK before processing any other control packet.

requirements.title: An inbound QoS 1 PUBLISH must be acknowledged with PUBACK; a QoS 2 PUBLISH mu...
requirements.text: An inbound QoS 1 PUBLISH must be acknowledged with PUBACK; a QoS 2 PUBLISH must be acknowledged with PUBREC.

requirements.title: PUBLISH messages must be routed to every session whose filter matches per MQT...
requirements.text: PUBLISH messages must be routed to every session whose filter matches per MQTT §4.7, at min(publish QoS, granted QoS) capped at QoS 1; QoS 2 inbound must deliver exactly once on PUBREL.

requirements.title: SUBSCRIBE must grant the requested QoS, answer SUBACK, and replay matching re...
requirements.text: SUBSCRIBE must grant the requested QoS, answer SUBACK, and replay matching retained messages; a retained PUBLISH with empty payload must clear the retained topic; UNSUBSCRIBE must remove the filter and answer UNSUBACK.

requirements.title: A last-will message provided in CONNECT must be published when the session en...
requirements.text: A last-will message provided in CONNECT must be published when the session ends without a DISCONNECT, and must be suppressed on a clean DISCONNECT.

requirements.title: WithTLS must cause ListenAndServe to wrap accepted connections in TLS
requirements.text: WithTLS must cause ListenAndServe to wrap accepted connections in TLS.

requirements.title: The Server must implement mqtt.MetricsProvider and expose SubscriberCount and...
requirements.text: The Server must implement mqtt.MetricsProvider and expose SubscriberCount and RetainedCount.

requirements.title: rest.New must wrap an mqtt.Client and Handler must serve POST /publish, GET /...
requirements.text: rest.New must wrap an mqtt.Client and Handler must serve POST /publish, GET /subscribe, and GET /retain routes with multi-level topic/filter path segments.

requirements.title: POST /publish/{topic} must publish the request body to the topic and return 2...
requirements.text: POST /publish/{topic} must publish the request body to the topic and return 202 Accepted; a body exceeding the configured maximum must return 413.

requirements.title: The optional ?qos query parameter must select the publish QoS (0, 1, or 2); a...
requirements.text: The optional ?qos query parameter must select the publish QoS (0, 1, or 2); an out-of-range or non-numeric value must return 400.

requirements.title: GET /subscribe/{filter} must subscribe to the filter and stream matching mess...
requirements.text: GET /subscribe/{filter} must subscribe to the filter and stream matching messages as Server-Sent Events with Content-Type text/event-stream.

requirements.title: Each forwarded SSE event must be a JSON-encoded mqtt.Message prefixed with 'd...
requirements.text: Each forwarded SSE event must be a JSON-encoded mqtt.Message prefixed with 'data: ' and flushed immediately.

requirements.title: The SSE stream must terminate and unsubscribe when the request context is can...
requirements.text: The SSE stream must terminate and unsubscribe when the request context is cancelled or the subscription channel closes.

requirements.title: GET /retain/{topic} must return the retained message for the topic within the...
requirements.text: GET /retain/{topic} must return the retained message for the topic within the configured timeout, or 404 if none arrives.

requirements.title: GET /retain/{topic} must ignore live (non-retained) traffic and only return a...
requirements.text: GET /retain/{topic} must ignore live (non-retained) traffic and only return a message whose Retained flag is set.

requirements.title: TLS server-certificate verification
requirements.text: A TLS client connection must verify the server certificate chain against the configured roots; an untrusted certificate must fail the handshake.

requirements.title: TLS minimum protocol version
requirements.text: The DialTLS convenience default must set MinVersion to TLS 1.2 or higher.

requirements.title: Mutual-TLS client authentication
requirements.text: When the broker requires client certificates, a client presenting no valid certificate must be rejected at the TLS handshake.

requirements.title: Untrusted remaining-length bounds
requirements.text: A malformed MQTT Remaining Length with a 5th continuation byte must be rejected, preventing integer overflow on untrusted wire input.

requirements.title: Unknown packet tolerance
requirements.text: An unexpected or unknown MQTT control-packet type received from the peer must be ignored without crashing the client.

requirements.title: Publish payload size limit
requirements.text: A REST publish body exceeding the configured maximum must be rejected with 413 rather than buffered without bound.

requirements.title: WebSocket accept-key verification
requirements.text: The RFC 6455 Sec-WebSocket-Accept value must be computed from the client key and GUID and verified before the connection is used.

requirements.title: Malformed payload isolation
requirements.text: A non-JSON or malformed signal payload must be dropped without stalling or terminating the subscription stream.

requirements.title: Topic-alias injection guard
requirements.text: An MQTT v5 PUBLISH with an empty topic and an unregistered topic alias must be dropped, never delivered with an attacker-chosen topic.
